creator: sf@FreeBSD.org
text:
At Sat, 22 Dec 2001 16:03:53 -0500 (EST),
Alan Eldridge wrote:
> The version number I assigned 1.10.p11.a13 is designed to allow smooth
> upgrading once 1.11 (release) come out without need of PORTEPOCH.

1.11.a13 is enough.

$ pkg_version -t 1.10_1 1.11.a13
<
$ pkg_version -t 1.11.a13 1.11
<

-- 
FUJISHIMA Satsuki
